content:
Hello everyone,

I'm writing to address some of the questions and suggestions you've brought up recently. Your feedback is incredibly valuable, and I appreciate you taking the time to share your thoughts.

**Task Assignments and Project Priorities**
Many of you have asked about how to assign tasks and avoid overlaps, as well as our current priorities.

**How to Assign Tasks**
Given that this is an interest-driven volunteer project with over 50 volunteers and 11 different languages, it's not feasible for me to individually assign tasks to everyone alone. We're relying on a self-assignment system for the time being: 

You can choose the parts you're interested in and submit your contributions via **GitHub**.
We encourage volunteers working on the same language to communicate with each other to avoid overlaps.

**Moderators**
If you're interested in taking on a more active role, we are looking for dedicated volunteers to become **Moderators** for their language team. 

**Moderators **will be responsible for helping with task management and making decisions, such as coordinating who's going to work on what.
Priority will be given to volunteers who have expressed interest and have relevant project management experience.

We are currently looking for:

**English:** 3 Moderators (with <@272394963642220545> as the first Moderator)
**Russian:** 2 Moderators
**Other Languages:** 1 Moderator for each

**Project Priorities**

**For the English language, **our main priority is to finish the remaining **STORY and LORE** content, including:

**1. Story Chapters
2. Text Communicator Messages
3. Wheel of Destiny & Awakener Story Descriptions
4. Investigation Event Descriptions**
You can contribute by locating these texts in the Source Sheet and submitting your translation or proofread version via GitHub.

**For all other languages**, we are prioritizing three main areas:

1. **UI Improvement**: We want to improve the interface by catching and correcting any cutoffs or wrong translations. 
You can help by submitting UI issues to the **[Testing Sheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1WQpzrkFNluWgAkKHQTLB1wbmJQFHp-HsYZ_Hm9_e_Vc/edit?usp=sharing)** or by submitting your translation or proofread version via **GitHub**.

2. **Terminology Standardization**: You can contribute by editing the **[IMPORTANT TERMS](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1cKOGnLESM3WajWbTVEWdacvpuBfENQw1iQ9ep-ih9Mc/edit?usp=sharing)** sheet, including Wheel of Destiny & Character Names and some core gameplay terms. You can also create your language's individual new Term Base sheet and add new terms (reference [the English one](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1QW8qr1y7DLFnTZVOHUTmw_IBL9bq8JEaIPKQGMOjzKE/edit?usp=sharing) for format) 
I'm also working on uploading the existing machine translations for these terms for volunteers to reference.

3. **Combat/Gameplay Text**: This includes skill descriptions and other related content. You can submit your translation or proofread version via **GitHub**.
